entity.label: Mithkah
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Sweetness, one of the stations of the Israelites in the wilderness (Num. 33:28, 29).

nodes.label: Mithkah
nodes.description: Sweetness, one of the stations of the Israelites in the wilderness (Num. 33:28, 29).

verses.text: And they removed from Tarah, and pitched in Mithcah.
And they went from Mithcah, and pitched in Hashmonah.
